title: Modern Pack for CustomNPC+
description: A JAPPA Style pack for CustomNPC+ and CustomNPCs!
body:
In CustomNPC+ 1.9 new textures were designed for all the existing items to be more JAPPA-styled. These were all automatically added to the mod update. But, upon request, those who use later versions of Custom Npcs on 1.8 through 1.16 want access to these textures via a texture pack. Here they are! All the updated textures for you to use, please enjoy and give all credit to the Artist PopsicleNate for redoing all these textures.


Currently not updated are the Armors and Blocks. They will come in a later update so stay tuned! Thank you all for the support.

[![Showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KAMKEEL/CustomNPC-Plus/dev/images/showcase.gif)]()
